lines.text: Fleurdelys, my Resonator, why dost thou persist?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Why abandon thy oath? Why hinder the spread of my gospel?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Gehinnom, the lone dragon to have escaped?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The one blessed by the Dark Tide shall return to us. Continue thy disobedience at the risk of insanity.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Look around, thou hast none left.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: My most beloved Resonator, why persist in the error of thy ways?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier
